summary: Comprehensive testing of CRM application new features: Airtable-style inline editing, InlineCreatableSelect dropdowns, preview panel, Hubspot-style 3-column customer detail page, and Calls (Aramalar) feature. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint working
/api/options/grouped returns 36+ options correctly
Options CRUD operations working
Customers CRUD operations working
Customer search and filtering working
/api/calls endpoint - GET all calls working
/api/calls endpoint - POST create call working
/api/calls endpoint - GET calls by customer_id working
/api/calls endpoint - GET call by ID working
/api/calls endpoint - PUT update call working
Visits CRUD operations working
Stats endpoint returning dashboard data
Kanban statuses and customers endpoints working
Frontend: Customers page loads with Airtable-style table
Frontend: Inline editing on text fields working
Frontend: InlineCreatableSelect dropdowns open and show options
Frontend: Eye button appears on row hover
Frontend: Preview panel opens and shows customer details
Frontend: Customer detail page has 3-column Hubspot layout
Frontend: All 5 tabs visible (Akış, Notlar, Aramalar, Ziyaretler, Dosyalar)
Frontend: Aramalar tab shows call records
Frontend: 'Arama Ekle' button visible and functional
Frontend: New call form opens with all fields
Frontend: Call saved successfully with toast notification
Frontend: Activity (Akış) tab shows timeline of all activities
seed_data_creation: Created test user session for frontend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new CRM features tested and working: Airtable-style inline editing with InlineCreatableSelect dropdowns, preview panel on hover, 3-column Hubspot-style customer detail page, and Calls (Aramalar) feature with full CRUD. Backend API tests in /app/tests/test_crm_api.py cover all endpoints including the new /api/calls endpoints.
